signals.npcLine: Whispers say CHIP tech nodes glitch after recent market tremors.
signals.questPulse: Investigate CHIP data streams for exploitable weaknesses.
signals.worldFeed: CHIP circuits flicker amid economic shadows.
signals.clueEvent: Uncover hidden bugs in CHIP's codebase.

signals.npcLine: RAVE sectors buzz with strange signals, ripe for infiltration.
signals.questPulse: Trace RAVE frequency distortions to their origin point.
signals.worldFeed: RAVE frequencies spike despite market fears.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips the grid; shadows deepen around OPG exchanges.
signals.questPulse: Scout OPG vaults before systems collapse.
signals.clueEvent: Locate OPG breach points under duress.

signals.npcLine: MAGA caches flicker, their value clouded by sector unrest.
signals.questPulse: Monitor MAGA supply chains for illicit flows.
signals.worldFeed: MAGA’s shimmer fades with market dread.
signals.clueEvent: Trace MAGA anomalies through black market nodes.

signals.npcLine: AAVE vaults stand guarded; fear tightens control lines.
signals.questPulse: Secure AAVE assets before system lockdown.
signals.worldFeed: AAVE holdings frozen amid fear's rise.
signals.clueEvent: Identify threats in AAVE's encrypted layers.
